title: Backend Developer Vacancy at OLX India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at OLX India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Backend Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!
